seoTitle: Athelstone vs Auburn — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Athelstone and Auburn. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Athelstone and Auburn.
heading: Athelstone vs Auburn — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Athelstone, South Australia and Auburn, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Auburn has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Athelstone (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Athelstone or Auburn safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Athelstone has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Auburn scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Athelstone scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Auburn scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Athelstone or Auburn?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Auburn has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
